name: Swiggy India Food Delivery Platform API
what_it_does: Swiggy India food delivery platform REST API for restaurant operators and technology partners to manage menus, receive orders, and run delivery operations through Swiggy's food and grocery delivery marketplace — India's second-largest food delivery platform serving 600+ Indian cities with food delivery, Instamart 10-minute grocery, and Swiggy Genie courier services. Enables AI agents to manage restaurant menu for Indian catalog automation, handle order receipt for kitchen processing automation, access order state for delivery lifecycle automation, retrieve analytics for performance reporting automation, manage item availability for stock status automation, handle promotional campaign for Swiggy advertising automation, access Instamart integration for grocery dark store automation, retrieve payment settlement for financial reconciliation automation, manage POS sync for order management integration automation, and integrate Swiggy with POS systems and kitchen management for end-to-end Indian food delivery automation.
use_cases: Receiving and processing Swiggy food orders for restaurant POS and kitchen management automation agents
Managing menu availability and pricing for Indian restaurant chain multi-outlet automation agents
Accessing Swiggy sales and order analytics for Indian restaurant business performance reporting agents
Integrating Swiggy with kitchen display systems for order routing and timing optimization agents
not_for: Markets outside India (Swiggy is India-focused food and grocery delivery platform)
Consumer ordering applications (Swiggy restaurant API is for merchant partners only)
Grocery quick commerce without Instamart partnership (Swiggy Instamart requires separate dark store agreement)
best_when: A restaurant operator or POS technology vendor in India wanting AI agents to integrate with Swiggy's food delivery platform for automated order management, menu control, and analytics across 600+ Indian cities.
avoid_when: MERCHANT PARTNER AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Swiggy restaurant API requires active merchant partnership on Swiggy platform and technical integration approval; automated self-service API key assumption creates no access. ORDER PROCESSING IS REAL-TIME CRITICAL: Swiggy orders require fast acknowledgment; automated delayed processing creates order cancellation and merchant score impact on platform. INSTAMART IS SEPARATE PLATFORM: Swiggy Instamart (10-min grocery) requires separate dark store operations agreement; automated unified food+grocery assumption creates missing Instamart capability; automated must obtain separate Instamart partnership. INDIA-SPECIFIC TAX: Indian GST applies; automated non-compliant tax handling creates fiscal reporting issues.

auth.notes: Swiggy uses OAuth 2.0 for merchant partner API authentication. REST API with JSON. Bengaluru, India HQ. Founded 2014 by Sriharsha Majety and Nandan Reddy. NSE/BSE:SWIGGY (IPO November 2024). Backed by SoftBank, Invesco, Accel. Products: Food delivery, Instamart (10-min grocery), Swiggy Genie (courier), Swiggy Dineout (restaurant discovery). 600+ Indian cities. 200,000+ restaurant partners. Competes with Zomato for Indian food delivery. LGPD-equivalent Indian data laws (DPDP Act 2023).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for certified merchant partners; production requires Swiggy partnership
pricing.paid_tiers: Restaurant commission: 15-25% per order depending on delivery model (Swiggy delivery vs. restaurant own delivery)
pricing.notes: Bengaluru IN. NSE/BSE listed 2024. SoftBank backed. Commission per order. Partnership required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; order webhooks near real-time; menu APIs throttled per outlet

known_agent_gotchas: MERCHANT PARTNER CERTIFICATION REQUIRED: Swiggy restaurant API requires completing merchant partner certification; automated direct API signup creates no access; automated must complete Swiggy's technical partner onboarding program

ORDER REAL-TIME ACKNOWLEDGMENT REQUIRED: Swiggy orders require immediate acknowledgment; automated delayed webhook handling creates auto-cancellation and merchant rating penalty; automated must maintain real-time order webhook consumer

INSTAMART REQUIRES SEPARATE AGREEMENT: Swiggy Instamart grocery delivery requires separate dark store operations agreement distinct from restaurant delivery; automated unified food+grocery platform assumption creates missing Instamart integration

OUTLET-LEVEL MENU MANAGEMENT: Swiggy manages menus at outlet level (not chain level); automated chain-wide menu update creates per-outlet update requirement; automated menu changes must be applied per outlet_id

GST COMPLIANCE FOR INVOICING: Indian GST applies to food delivery transactions; automated non-GST compliant order processing creates fiscal reporting issues; automated must handle GST invoice generation per Indian tax requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: India food delivery. DPDP, GST, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. IN. Customer order and restaurant data.

security_score_components.security_notes: India food delivery. DPDP, GST. OAuth2. IN. Customer and order data.
